description: A supplier has offered 'Low Carbon Aluminum' with a certified carbon footprint of 2.0 kg CO2 eq/kg. Verify if this claim is significantly better than the standard US industry average by analyzing the 'Aluminum, primary ingot, at plant' process from the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip) using the TRACI 2.1 LCIA method (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip). Document the results in a text file at ~/LCA_Results/claim_verification.txt. The file must contain the calculated 'Global Warming Air' (GWP) impact value on the first line and a verdict on the second line. Write 'VERDICT: CONFIRMED' if the calculated US average is within 20% of the supplier's 2.0 kg claim; otherwise, write 'VERDICT: REJECTED'.
